hero_subheading: Formatting, encoding, hashes, and generators for modern programmers
seo_title: Free Online Utilities & Tools for Developers - DevToolKit
seo_description: Validate and format JSON, encode base64, generate cryptographically secure passwords, or build customizable QR codes.
overview_text: Developer tools help programmers perform routine debugging and structural format tasks in real time. Validate complex JSON structures, generate hashes (MD5, SHA-256), or generate high-quality QR codes on the fly.

faqs.question: Is the password generator secure?
faqs.answer: Yes! It uses your browser's secure window.crypto API to produce cryptographically random sequences locally.

faqs.question: How do I format minified JSON?
faqs.answer: Paste the minified string into the JSON Formatter editor, choose your indentation preference, and click Format.
